_comment: CRUX Studio tool config — agent mode auto-load

tools.name: read_file
tools.description: 读取文本文件内容，返回带行号。大文件用 offset(起始行)和 limit(最大行数)分段读取。改文件前先用此工具确认内容。

offset.description: 从第几行开始读（0=开头，默认0）

limit.description: 最多读多少行（0=全部，默认0=最多500行）

tools.name: write_file
tools.description: 创建新文件或完全覆盖已有文件。UTF-8 编码。参数: path=文件路径, content=完整文件内容。会覆盖整个文件，不是追加。支持任意字符。

tools.name: edit_file
tools.description: 替换文件中的一段文本。参数: path=文件路径, old_text=要替换的原文本（必须和文件中一字不差含缩进）, new_text=新文本。只替换第一个匹配。先用 read_file 确认原文本内容再调用此工具。

old_text.description: 要替换的原始文本（必须精确匹配，包括缩进）

tools.name: search_files
tools.description: 在项目中搜索代码/文本（支持正则表达式）。返回格式: 文件路径:行号:匹配行。搜 .py .js .ts .md .json 等代码文件。pattern 参数接受 Python 正则语法。

tools.name: glob_files
tools.description: 按文件名模式搜索文件（支持 glob 通配符，如 **/*.py, src/**/*.ts）。返回匹配的文件路径列表。

tools.name: list_files
tools.description: 列出目录下的文件和子目录（含文件大小）。可递归列出。

tools.name: think_deep
tools.description: Deep reasoning via local LLM (llama.cpp). Use for offline analysis. For online deep reasoning, prefer direct conversation or /beast heavy.

prompt.description: 推理任务描述，越详细越好

tools.name: run_python
tools.description: 执行 Python 代码并返回结果。子进程隔离执行，30s 超时，支持 import/文件读写/class 定义（exec/eval/compile/breakpoint 禁用）。仅用于简单代码；复杂代码先用 write_file 写 .py 文件再 run_bash 执行。

tools.name: run_bash
tools.description: 执行任意 shell/bash 命令并返回输出。三模式：sync(默认,30s超时)、background(后台运行,完成后通知)、detach(完全分离,会话关闭后仍存活)。用于构建/部署/服务启动等。⚠ 命令会经过沙箱验证。借鉴: Copilot CLI powershell 三模式设计。

command.description: 要执行的 shell 命令

run_in_background.description: 是否后台运行（默认false）。true=后台异步执行,完成后通知; 适合长时间构建/测试/安装。

detach.description: 是否完全分离（默认false）。true=进程脱离会话,关闭后仍存活; 适合启动服务/守护进程。需run_in_background=true。

description.description: 后台任务描述（run_in_background=true时建议填写,用于任务列表显示）。

tools.name: run_test
tools.description: 运行项目测试（pytest）

timeout.description: 超时秒数，默认 600（10 分钟）。全量跑设大些，单文件可缩小。

tools.name: web_fetch
tools.description: 获取网页文本内容（最多5000字符），支持重定向和超时。

tools.name: web_search
tools.description: 搜索互联网（通过 DuckDuckGo HTML 版），返回前5条结果标题和摘要。

tools.name: git_status
tools.description: 查看 git 仓库状态（简短格式）

tools.name: git_diff
tools.description: 查看 git 未提交的更改（统计摘要）

tools.name: git_log
tools.description: 查看最近 git 提交记录（最近10条）

tools.name: git_add_commit
tools.description: 暂存并提交所有更改到 git。需要提供提交信息。会自动 git add -A 然后提交。

tools.name: github_search
tools.description: 搜索 GitHub: repos / issues / PRs / code / commits，5 合 1。支持语言、owner、排序、标签等过滤。

search_type.description: 搜索类型: repos|issues|prs|code|commits（默认 repos）

language.description: 编程语言过滤，如 python, go, rust

tools.name: github_repo_view
tools.description: 查看 GitHub 仓库信息：描述、星标、语言、创建时间等。接受 URL 或 owner/repo 格式。

repo.description: 仓库: owner/repo 或完整 URL。空则自动检测当前仓库

tools.name: github_repo_list
tools.description: 列出 GitHub 仓库（默认当前用户，可指定 owner）。

owner.description: 用户名或组织名（空则当前用户）

tools.name: github_browse
tools.description: 读取 GitHub 仓库的文件内容或目录树。突破 web_fetch 5000 字限制，无大小上限。

repo.description: 仓库: owner/repo 或 URL（必填）

path.description: 文件路径或目录路径（空则列出根目录）

tools.name: github_readme
tools.description: 一键读取任意 GitHub 仓库的 README 文件内容。

repo.description: 仓库: owner/repo 或 URL（必填）

tools.name: github_release
tools.description: 列出 GitHub releases 或查看指定 tag 的 release 详情（含 changelog）。

repo.description: 仓库: owner/repo 或 URL（必填）

tag.description: Release tag（空则列出所有 releases）

tools.name: github_issue
tools.description: GitHub Issues: 列出或创建。PR 创建由 git_tools.git_pr_create 覆盖。

repo.description: 仓库: owner/repo 或 URL（必填）

tools.name: github_pr
tools.description: GitHub PRs: 列出或查看详情（create/merge 由 git_tools 覆盖）。

repo.description: 仓库: owner/repo 或 URL（必填）

state.description: open | closed | merged | all（默认 open）

number.description: PR 编号（指定则查看详情）

tools.name: github_api
tools.description: 万能钥匙：调用任意 GitHub REST/GraphQL endpoint。AI 能做 GitHub 上的一切。零限制。

method.description: HTTP 方法: GET|POST|PATCH|PUT|DELETE（默认 GET）

fields.description: 请求参数，换行分隔的 key=value 对

jq_filter.description: jq 表达式过滤输出（可选）

paginate.description: 自动翻页: true 启用

tools.name: github_write_file
tools.description: 通过 GitHub Contents API 在远端创建或更新文件并自动 commit。更新已有文件需先通过 github_browse 获取 sha。典型工作流：github_browse 获取 sha → github_write_file 写入 → git_pr_create 创建 PR。

repo.description: 仓库: owner/repo 或 URL（必填）

content.description: 文件内容（必填，自动 Base64 编码）

branch.description: 目标分支（空则默认分支）

sha.description: 文件当前 blob sha（更新已有文件时必填，可通过 github_browse 获取）

tools.name: pip_install
tools.description: 安装 Python 包

tools.name: tree_dir
tools.description: 以树形结构展示目录布局（最多3层深度）。快速了解项目结构。

tools.name: count_lines
tools.description: 统计代码行数，按文件类型分类。返回格式: .py XXXX lines in NN files。默认扫描项目根目录，可指定子目录或单个文件缩小范围。

path.description: 目录或文件路径（空=项目根目录 .）

tools.name: env_check
tools.description: 检查当前运行环境：Python 版本、已安装的关键包、git 状态。诊断环境问题时使用。

tools.name: download_file
tools.description: 下载文件到指定路径。支持 HTTP/HTTPS URL。适合下载图片、视频、数据集等。

tools.name: create_markdown
tools.description: Create a markdown document

title.description: 文档标题（同时用于生成文件名）

tools.name: create_html
tools.description: Create an HTML page

title.description: 页面标题（用于 <title> 和 <h1>，同时生成文件名）

body.description: HTML body 内容（放在 <h1> 之后）

tools.name: create_pdf
tools.description: Create a PDF document

content.description: PDF 文本内容（支持中文，使用 reportlab 渲染）

tools.name: text_to_speech
tools.description: Convert text to speech (MP3 via edge-tts)

text.description: 要转换为语音的文本内容

lang.description: 语音语言代码：zh=中文（XiaoxiaoNeural），其它=英文（JennyNeural），默认 zh

tools.name: deploy_vercel
tools.description: Deploy project to Vercel

project_dir.description: 要部署的项目目录（默认当前目录 .）

token.description: Vercel 认证 token（留空则用已登录的账户）

tools.name: skill_search
tools.description: Semantic code search (RAG)

query.description: 自然语言搜索查询（TF-IDF 语义匹配代码片段）

tools.name: js_eval
tools.description: Run JavaScript in persistent Node REPL (Codex js_repl equivalent)

tools.name: mcp_connect
tools.description: Connect to an MCP server

server_name.description: MCP 服务器逻辑名（后续 mcp_call 用此名引用）

command.description: 启动 MCP 服务器进程的命令（如可执行文件路径）

args.description: 传给服务器命令的参数（空格分隔，留空表示无额外参数）

tools.name: mcp_call
tools.description: Call a tool on an MCP server

server_name.description: 已连接的 MCP 服务器名（mcp_connect 时指定的 server_name）

tool_name.description: 要在 MCP 服务器上调用的工具名

args_json.description: 传给工具的参数 JSON 字符串（默认 "{}"）

tools.name: pw_navigate
tools.description: Navigate browser to URL (persistent session)

url.description: 要让浏览器导航到的 URL（会做安全校验）

tools.name: cdp_ask_chatgpt
tools.description: 仅在以下场景使用：(1)需要另一个AI视角交叉验证复杂推理 (2)需要ChatGPT可能更新的外部知识 (3)用户明确要求。禁止用于代码编写/调试/文件操作/简单问答 — DeepSeek自己更擅长这些。每次调用耗时30秒+，谨慎使用。

question.description: 要发送给 ChatGPT 的问题（主参数名）

text.description: 要发送给 ChatGPT 的问题（别名，等同于 question）

prompt.description: 要发送给 ChatGPT 的问题（别名，等同于 question）

message.description: 要发送给 ChatGPT 的问题（别名，等同于 question）

query.description: 要发送给 ChatGPT 的问题（别名，等同于 question）

input.description: 要发送给 ChatGPT 的问题（别名，等同于 question）

properties.description: 备选参数容器（兼容 properties 参数名传入，自动提取 question/text/prompt 等字段）

tools.name: transcribe_audio
tools.description: Transcribe audio file to text

audio_path.description: 要转写的音频文件路径（mp3/wav/m4a 等）

tools.name: code_analyze
tools.description: Analyze a source file's structure: list functions, classes, imports with line numbers. Supports .py, .js, .jsx, .ts, .tsx, .go, .rs.

file_path.description: Path to the source file to analyze

tools.name: find_symbol
tools.description: Find where a function or class is defined across the project. Returns file path and line number.

symbol.description: Function or class name to find

directory.description: Project directory to search (default: current dir)

tools.name: search_symbols
tools.description: Search for functions/classes matching a regex pattern. Returns matches with file locations.

pattern.description: Regex pattern to match symbol names

directory.description: Project directory to search (default: current dir)

tools.name: find_references
tools.description: Find all references to a symbol in a file. Returns line numbers and context.

symbol.description: Symbol name to find references for

tools.name: graph_neighbors
tools.description: Query the code knowledge graph: find direct neighbors of a node (who imports/calls/contains/defines it). Use for impact analysis before edits.

node.description: Node name: a symbol like 'ChatSession' or a file path like 'core/chat.py'

direction.description: out (who I point to) | in (who points to me) | both (default)

edge_type.description: Optional filter: imports | calls | contains | defines

directory.description: Project directory to search (default: current dir)

tools.name: graph_ancestors
tools.description: Query the code knowledge graph: BFS upstream dependencies (who depends on this node, recursively). Use before deleting a symbol to check all references.

node.description: Node name: a symbol like 'ChatSession' or a file path like 'core/chat.py'

directory.description: Project directory to search (default: current dir)

tools.name: graph_descendants
tools.description: Query the code knowledge graph: BFS downstream impact (what this node depends on / affects, recursively). Use before renaming to list all call sites.

node.description: Node name: a symbol like 'ChatSession' or a file path like 'core/chat.py'

directory.description: Project directory to search (default: current dir)

tools.name: patch_file
tools.description:
结构化补丁：支持多文件批量修改（Add/Update/Delete），自动备份+语法校验+失败回滚。适用场景：跨文件重构、批量修复、新文件创建+已有文件修改一次完成。格式：*** Update File: path
@@ context
-old
+new。失败时自动回滚所有变更，比 edit_file 逐文件替换更安全高效。

patch_text.description: 结构化补丁文本。支持三种操作：*** Update File: path（修改文件，@@ 标记 context 匹配行，- 删除行，+ 新增行）；*** Add File: path（创建文件，+ 开头为内容行）；*** Delete File: path（删除文件）。多个操作可在同一个 patch_text 里拼接。

verify.description: 是否对 .py 文件做 AST 语法校验，失败则自动回滚全部变更（默认 true）

tools.name: patch_undo
tools.description: 撤销最近一次 patch_file 的所有变更：把修改过的文件写回改前内容、删除新建的文件、恢复被删除的文件。幂等，连续调用第二次会返回 nothing_to_undo。用于 patch_file 应用后发现方向错误、语法虽过但逻辑不对、或误删文件时的快速回退。

tools.name: execute_plan
tools.description: 自主执行多步计划：按依赖顺序执行步骤、自动校验（语法/测试）、错误自反思重试、追踪错误并生成报告。不传 steps 时自动用 LLM 智能规划。用于 bug 修复、审计检查、批量操作等多步编排场景。

steps.description: JSON 数组字符串，每项含 id/description/tool/args/depends_on/verify。不传时自动用 LLM 智能规划。

use_llm_plan.description: 是否用 LLM 智能规划生成步骤（默认 false）。steps 为空且此值为 true 时自动分解任务。

tools.name: create_goal
tools.description: 创建目标模式任务：将模糊意图转化为明确的完成契约——包含清晰终点、验证方式、边界条件和停止规则。借鉴: Kimi Code Goal Mode。

intent.description: 用户的原始意图/目标描述（可以是模糊的自然语言）

finish_line.description: 完成标准（如何判断目标已达成？用可验证的客观标准描述）

boundaries.description: 边界条件（什么不在范围内？哪些事情绝对不能做？）

max_steps.description: 最大步骤数（超过此数自动停止,防止无限循环,默认20）

tools.name: get_goal
tools.description: 获取当前活跃目标的完整状态——包括进度、预算消耗、已完成步骤、剩余步骤。

goal_id.description: 目标ID（不传则返回当前活跃目标）

tools.name: set_goal_budget
tools.description: 为目标设置/调整预算限制——最大步骤数、最大工具调用数、最大耗时(秒)。借鉴: Kimi Code SetGoalBudget。

goal_id.description: 目标ID（不传则作用于当前活跃目标）

tools.name: update_goal
tools.description: 更新目标状态——标记完成/暂停/取消,或修改目标描述。借鉴: Kimi Code UpdateGoal。

goal_id.description: 目标ID（不传则作用于当前活跃目标）

tools.name: view_image
tools.description: Open image with system default viewer. Supports PNG, JPG, GIF, WebP, SVG.

tools.name: update_plan
tools.description: Update the current execution plan mid-task — add, remove, modify, or insert a step.

tools.name: tool_search
tools.description: Search available tools by keyword. Returns matching tool names and descriptions.

tools.name: request_user_input
tools.description: Pause and ask the user a question. Returns the user's text response.

tools.name: safe_rewrite_file
tools.description: Safer than apply_patch: provide old_lines + new_lines, code finds exact match and replaces. For self-repair of core files — no context guessing needed.

tools.name: lsp_goto_definition
tools.description: Jump to the definition of a symbol at a given position in a file using the Language Server Protocol. Returns the file URI and range of the definition. Use this to navigate code.

file_path.description: Absolute path to the source file

character.description: 0-based character offset in the line (first character is 0)

tools.name: lsp_hover
tools.description: Get hover information (type signature, documentation) for a symbol at a given position in a file using LSP. Returns markdown or plaintext content with type info and docs.

file_path.description: Absolute path to the source file

tools.name: lsp_diagnostics
tools.description: Get diagnostics (errors, warnings, hints) for a file using LSP. The file is opened in the language server and any issues are returned. Use this to check for compilation or lint errors.

file_path.description: Absolute path to the source file

tools.name: lsp_find_references
tools.description: Find all references to the symbol at a given position in a file using LSP. Returns a list of locations where the symbol is used. Use this to understand impact before refactoring.

file_path.description: Absolute path to the source file

tools.name: lsp_completion
tools.description: Get autocomplete suggestions at a given position in a file using LSP. Returns a list of completion items with labels, detail, and documentation. Use this to get code suggestions.

file_path.description: Absolute path to the source file

tools.name: lsp_rename
tools.description: Rename a symbol across the entire project using LSP. Returns a list of workspace edits showing all files and positions that will be changed. Use this for safe, project-wide refactoring.

file_path.description: Absolute path to the source file containing the symbol

new_name.description: The new name for the symbol

tools.name: code_review
tools.description: Review code quality: check changed files for style/logic/performance/maintainability issues. Modeled after Copilot CLI /review command.

files.description: List of file paths to review (empty = auto-detect git diff .py files)

mode.description: Review mode: code=code quality, security=security review (default code)

tools.name: security_review
tools.description: Review security vulnerabilities: check for hardcoded credentials/SQL injection/XSS/path traversal/insecure deserialization etc. Modeled after Copilot CLI /security-review command.

files.description: List of file paths to review (empty = auto-detect git diff .py files)

tools.name: run_format
tools.description: Auto-format code files. Detects language and applies the correct formatter: ruff format + isort for Python, prettier for JS/TS/HTML/CSS. Use --check for dry-run without modifying files.

paths.description: Space-separated file/directory paths to format. Default: all tracked files in project.

check.description: If true, only check formatting without modifying files (dry-run).

tools.name: run_lint
tools.description: Run static analysis / linting. Detects language and uses ruff check (Python) or eslint (JS/TS). Use --fix to auto-fix issues.

paths.description: Space-separated file/directory paths to lint. Default: all tracked files.

fix.description: If true, auto-fix lint issues where possible.

tools.name: debug_inspect
tools.description: Run a test or script and capture full traceback with per-frame local variable values on failure. Use this to debug test failures or script errors — see exactly what variables were at each stack frame when the error occurred.

target.description: Test target or script path. e.g. 'tests/' or 'tests/test_foo.py::test_bar' or 'core/agent.py'

extra_args.description: Extra pytest flags (e.g. '-x -k test_name') or script arguments

tools.name: http_request
tools.description: Make an HTTP request. Supports GET/POST/PUT/DELETE with custom headers and body. Use for testing REST APIs, fetching data from endpoints, or debugging HTTP services. Returns status, headers, and body (truncated to 10KB).

method.description: HTTP method: GET, POST, PUT, DELETE, PATCH (default GET)

tools.name: db_query
tools.description: Execute a SQL query on a SQLite database file. Supports SELECT queries (read-only by default) and INSERT/UPDATE/DELETE with automatic read-write fallback. Returns rows as JSON array. Use for inspecting databases, running analytics queries, or data migrations.

db_path.description: Path to the SQLite database file

tools.name: notebook_open
tools.description: Open a Jupyter notebook (.ipynb) and return cell summaries with index, type, and source preview.

tools.name: notebook_edit_cell
tools.description: Edit a cell's source in a Jupyter notebook. Provide the notebook path, cell index (0-based), and new source.

source.description: New source code for the cell

tools.name: notebook_add_cell
tools.description: Add a new cell to a Jupyter notebook. Specify cell_type as 'code' or 'markdown', and insertion position.

index.description: Insertion index (append to end if omitted)

tools.name: notebook_run_cell
tools.description: Execute a cell in a Jupyter notebook and return the output (stdout, stderr, display data). Requires a running kernel.

tools.name: notebook_save
tools.description: Save a Jupyter notebook to disk. Call after making edits to persist changes.

tools.name: estimate_tokens
tools.description: Estimate the token count for a given text using a simple heuristic (1 token ~ 4 chars English, ~1.5 chars Chinese). Use to check if content fits within model context limits before sending.

text.description: Text to estimate token count for

tools.name: inspect_last_error
tools.description: Recover the last captured error traceback from a previous failed tool or script execution. Use when a previous operation failed and you need to see exactly what went wrong without re-running.

tools.name: pw_navigate_v2
tools.description: 使用 Playwright 独立子进程导航浏览器到指定 URL，无 asyncio 冲突
